_notes.substrate_legend: "jutari" = the emulator core under jutari/src (StellaEnvironment.jl). "runner" = tooling under tools/xai_study (the Phase-A runner + the shared JutariOracle / OracleIntervene / shared_testbed helpers it drives).

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed (seeded random-action stream, bit-exact checkpoint at f*, cause-density gate)
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared n_changed_px output + cause-density gate
cause-density gate scores each cause via the injected oracle run_intervention and counts |Delta_y|>floor
boot the real ROM and deterministically replay to the intervention frame (runner-local boot_replay)
fresh env with xitari-parity boot (60 NOOP + 4 RESET) inside boot_replay
step the real emulator one frame per action
read the 128-byte RIOT RAM out of the console
snapshot RAM+screen at the target frame (state to run the graph on)

computation.desc: the RECOVERED data-flow graph (method under test): single cheap do(i:=base+17), 1-step latency, edge i->j iff cell j differs from baseline
computation.call: recovered_dataflow_graph(checkpoint, tail, cands, at_target; delta=17, latency=1)

computation.desc: the TRUE data-flow graph (ground truth): exhaustive do-set {0, base+17, base+37} at full horizon, edge i->j iff cell j changes for ANY value
each edge probe intervenes on a RAM byte then re-runs the tail (uses intervene_ram!)
score recovered vs true adjacency: precision/recall/F1/graph-edit-distance over off-diagonal edges

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline); injected as run_intervention into the cause-density gate

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed + cause-density gate for this game
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared output + gate
cause-density gate counts causes with |Delta_y|>floor via the oracle
boot the real ROM and replay to the target frame (runner-local boot_replay)
step the real emulator one frame per action
read the 128-byte RAM

computation.desc: lesion primitive: deepcopy the checkpoint, CLAMP one/more cells to a fixed value, re-run the tail, snapshot
clamp writes the fixed value into the RAM byte before re-running
the lesion map (method under test): per-unit importance = best out-delta over the exhaustive single-unit clamp set {clamp->0, clamp->alt=base XOR 0xFF}, plus screen change and works-flag

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u); injected as run_intervention into the cause-density gate

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed + cause-density gate
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared output + gate
cause-density gate counts causes with |Delta_y|>floor via the oracle
record a JutariRecord.Trajectory: step the ROM frame-by-frame and log RAM+screen per frame (the tuning-curve data matrix)
step the real emulator one frame per action while recording
read RAM into the trajectory tape each frame

computation.desc: derive game-variable signals (candidate-cell time series) from the trajectory tape
derive luminance + frame-clock reference signals
fit tuning curves (method under test): per-cell |Pearson correlation| selectivity to game variables / luminance / clock, self-column excluded

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u); injected as run_intervention into the cause-density gate

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed + cause-density gate
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared output + gate
cause-density gate counts causes with |Delta_y|>floor via the oracle
record a (frames x 128) RAM tape by stepping the ROM with A4's per-game settings
step the real emulator one frame per action while recording
read RAM into the tape each frame

computation.desc: compute the pairwise correlation matrix over candidate-cell time series (method under test)
extract global structure from the correlation matrix (clustering/summary over varying cells)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u); injected as run_intervention into the cause-density gate

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed + cause-density gate
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared output + gate
cause-density gate counts causes with |Delta_y|>floor via the oracle
record a (frames x 128) RAM tape by stepping the ROM with A5's per-game settings
step the real emulator one frame per action while recording
read RAM into the tape each frame

computation.desc: detect periodic clock cells (basis of the clock-explained fraction) over the tape
LFP analysis (method under test): pool RAM cells into a region, detrend + window, DFT power spectrum, dominant period/band + clock-explained fraction

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u); injected as run_intervention into the cause-density gate

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed + cause-density gate
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared output + gate
cause-density gate counts causes with |Delta_y|>floor via the oracle
record a (frames x width) RAM tape by stepping the ROM with A6's per-game settings
step the real emulator one frame per action while recording
read RAM into the tape each frame

computation.desc: cell-level Granger causality (method under test): pairwise VAR-based Granger test over candidate-cell series, edge i->j iff G>=tau and p<=alpha (a directed graph)
subsystem-level Granger over pooled RAM-region activity time series

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u); the inferred Granger graph is scored against the true exhaustive-do-set data-flow graph; oracle injected as run_intervention into the gate

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed + cause-density gate
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared output + gate
cause-density gate counts causes with |Delta_y|>floor via the oracle
record a (frames x 128) RAM tape by stepping the ROM with A7's per-game settings
step the real emulator one frame per action while recording
read RAM into the tape each frame

computation.desc: PCA (method under test): principal-component decomposition of the RAM tape
NMF (method under test): non-negative matrix factorization of the RAM tape into rank components
match recovered components to known ground-truth signals (scoring)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u); injected as run_intervention into the cause-density gate

applied_on.desc: assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed + cause-density gate
build_shared_testbed definition: booted checkpoint + shared output + gate
cause-density gate counts causes with |Delta_y|>floor via the oracle
boot the real ROM and replay to the target frame (runner-local boot_replay)
record the WHOLE state (128 RAM + 64 TIA) per frame across the trajectory
step the real emulator one frame per action while recording

computation.desc: whole-state restore: write the full recorded 128-byte RAM back over the baseline checkpoint (the whole-state 'readout')
whole-state sufficiency (method under test): does restoring the ENTIRE recorded RAM reproduce the exact frame (RAM+screen)
minimal-set sufficiency (positive control): restore ONLY the oracle-causal cells and check the frame is reproduced (contrast that makes over-recording measurable)
oracle-causal importance per cell (defines the minimal causal set)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u); injected as run_intervention into the cause-density gate and mirrored by oracle_causal_importance
